note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

Behemoth.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Stamina by 20% and your Armor penetration by 10% of your Strength.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration of Blood Frenzy and Harvest Time by 100%.

Blood Harvester.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Bolstered Form.baseDescription: Assume a bolstered form for 15 seconds, generating 30 Runic Power, increasing your Armor by 25%, and increasing your parry chance by 25%.

modifyingTalents.description: Bolstered Form now increases the damage nearby enemies take from you by 15% for 15 seconds.

Dealing damage with Reap, Dreadwake and Soul Strike now grants a stack of Painmail for 15 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

When Painmail stacks expire naturally, you are healed for 2% of your maximum health and reduce the cooldown of Bolstered Form by -0.5 sec for each stack.

Crimson Wraith.baseDescription: Increases your critical stike damage by 20%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cost of Crow's Harvest by -10 Runic Power.
Increases the duration of Deathwind by 4 sec and Crow's Harvest now deals 15% additional damage to enemies inside.

Damage dealt by Doomrend and Crow's Harvest now applies a bleed, dealing 56 + 8.5% AP Physical damage every 2 sec for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Dark Soldier.baseDescription: Increases your hit chance by 6% and reduces your Magic damage taken by -4%.

Dark Soul.baseDescription:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your Stamina equal to your Armor penetration rating.

Death's Presence.baseDescription:
Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Deathchaser.baseDescription: Force death upon an enemy, dealing 13 + 8% AP Shadowfrost Damage, repeating every 0 sec for 1 seconds, and generates Runic Power.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage dealt by Deathchaser by 15% and your hit chance by 3%.
Significantly increases the Runic Power generated by Deathchaser.
Deathchaser used against a target below 20% health will now reapply itself at the end of its duration until they die or until 5 seconds passes.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Reap, Deathchaser, and Wraithblade by 10%.

Damage dealt by Deathchaser now applies Soulrot.SoulrotRot the soul of your target, cursing them for 15 seconds. At the end of the duration the enemy will take damage based on the number of stacks accrued. 

Each instance of damage from Deathchaser adds 1 stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks. Dispelling this effect causes the dispeller to instantly take 1200 + 200% AP Shadow Damage.
Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker, Soulstone Lure, and Soul Shear by -25%.
Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker, Soul Shear, and Soulstone Lure by -50%.
Your Deathwind now also increases your healing taken by 10% while you stand within its radius.

Reaching 3 Reaped Souls now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10% and you regain 1% of your maximum health every 2 sec for 10 seconds. This will not trigger while already active.

In addition, the healing done by Deathwind is increased by 10%.
Increases the duration of Deathwind by 4 sec and Crow's Harvest now deals 15% additional damage to enemies inside.
Increases the damage of Deathwind, Murder, and Soul Strike by 30%.

Dirge.baseDescription:
Generates 2 Soul Fragments
Strike the enemy with both weapons, dealing 70% (130% if a dagger is equipped) Weapon Damage as Shadowfrost Damage with each, and generates Runic Power.

modifyingTalents.description:
Critical strikes with Dirge now generate 10 Runic Power.

Critical strikes with Murder now generate 1 additional Reaped Soul.
Increases the damage of Reap, Dirge, and Reliquary of the Lost by 20%.

Become an Endbringer for 15 seconds, increasing the damage of Dirge by 30%, the range by 20 yds, and causes it to generate 3 Reaped Souls.

For the duration, Dirge will heal you for 75% of its damage dealt.
Wraithblade now creates a spectral version of yourself for 12 seconds that casts Dirge and Murder on enemies.

Doomrend.baseDescription: Rend an enemy dealing 140% Weapon Damage plus 17 + 35% AP, causing you to apply a dark shield to them that absorbs the next 75 + 100% Strength healing done to them for 5 seconds, and generates Runic Power.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Doomrend by 10%.
Increases the healing absorbed by Doomrend by 30%.
Critical strikes with Doomrend now refund a Reaped Soul.
Increases the damage of Doomrend and Slaughter by 30%.

Damage dealt by Doomrend and Crow's Harvest now applies a bleed, dealing 56 + 8.5% AP Physical damage every 2 sec for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Dreadknight.baseDescription: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 40% and reduces the chance for spells to hit you by -4%.

Dreadwake.baseDescription:
Generates 1 Reaped Soul
Unleash a wave of souls upon enemies in a 12 yd cone, causing 80% Weapon Damage plus 5 Frost damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt with Dreadwake now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -1 sec.
While Tormented Souls is active on you, your melee attack speed is increased by 30% and your Dreadwake costs -5 less Runic Power.

Dealing damage with Reap, Dreadwake and Soul Strike now grants a stack of Painmail for 15 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

When Painmail stacks expire naturally, you are healed for 2% of your maximum health and reduce the cooldown of Bolstered Form by -0.5 sec for each stack.

Empyrean Fortitude.baseDescription: Increases your parry chance by 5% and parrying an attack now generates 2 Runic Power.

modifyingTalents.description:
Casting Endbringer now marks the ground beneath you as your Gravesite for 15 seconds.

Direct critical strikes made against enemies within a Gravesite now deals 530 + 36% AP Shadow damage.

Ethereal Guard.baseDescription:
Reduces the damage taken by party and raid members by -3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your melee haste by 10%.

Executioner.baseDescription:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Strength.

In addition, increases your Armor penetration by 30% against enemies below 35% health.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 30 Passive
Allows Extinction to stack an additional time and allows Wraithblade to grant you Extinction.ExtinctionYour next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

Final Requiem.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance with abilities that deal Shadow damage by 30% against enemies below 20% health.

Ghastly Screech.baseDescription: Screech with ghastly intent, silencing all nearby enemies for 4 seconds, and dealing 90 + 25% AP Shadowfrost Damage at the end of the duration.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Ghastly Screech and Soul Strike by -10.

Your Ghost Claw transforms into Wraith Claw and now has 2 charges.Wraith Claw2 Charges,15 sec recharge
Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50% of their movement speed for 8 seconds.

Whenever you kill an enemy, refund a charge of this ability. Scales with modifiers to Ghost Claw.

Level 30 Passive
Reduces the cooldown of Underwalk by -10 sec.

In addition, Withering Touch will now always apply Ghost Claw to the target.Ghost Claw (Speed)Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50% of their movement speed for 8 seconds.

Ghostly Weapon.baseDescription:
2 Charges, 40 sec recharge
Imbue your weapon with ghostly power for 15 seconds, causing melee attacks to deal 25% additional damage as Frost damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon now heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
Increases the duration of Ghostly Weapon and Soulrend by 5 sec.
Ghostly Weapon now causes your melee abilities to strike up to 2 additional targets near the primary target.
Increases the additional Frost damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon by 10%.
Abilities affected by Ghostly Weapon now deal 25% more damage per additional target.

Casting Harvest Time with an enemy targeted within 20 yds of you now unleashes a Blood Frenzy.Blood FrenzyDeals 1 + 36% AP Shadow Damage to your target every 0.75 sec for 7.5 seconds. At the end of the duration, the target takes an additional 457 + 45% AP Shadow Damage.
Increases the duration of Blood Frenzy and Harvest Time by 100%.

Harvester.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
You now heal yourself equal to 15% of all damage dealt.

Harvesting Grounds.baseDescription:
Create a harvesting ground at the target location for 10 seconds, enemies inside have their melee and ranged haste and movement speed reduced by -20%

For the duration, enemies that try to exit the harvesting ground will be pulled back to its center.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases the amount healed through the Harvest - Level 10 Passive by 10% and causes being in your Harvesting Grounds to increase this effect by an additional 25%.

Hemorrhage.baseDescription: Increases the damage and critical strike chance of your abilities by 10% against enemies below 35% health.

Jailer's Bargain.baseDescription:
Beckon the jailer, gaining a shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of your maximum health for 10 seconds.

While this is active you are considered Undead and are immune to fear, sleep, and charm effects.

Limbo.baseDescription:
Rip out of your mortal shell for 5 seconds, making you immune to all harmful spell effects and instantly restoring 30% of your maximum health and Runic Power.

Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

modifyingTalents.description: Dealing direct critical strikes with Shadow damage reduce the cooldown of Limbo by -2 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Limbo, Soulslam, and Shade.

Usable while stealthed.

Masochistic Rage.baseDescription: After a 1 sec delay, you suffer 660 + 36% AP damage, enraging you and increasing your damage dealt by 20% for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Generating Reaped Souls now has a 10% chance to trigger Masochistic Rage for 5 sec.

If Masochistic Rage is already active, it will instead extend the duration by 3 sec.

Mawborn.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of disarm and incapacitate effects against you by -20%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the range of Murder and Soul Shock by 5 yds.
Damage dealt by Soul Strike and Murder now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by -1 sec.
Increases the damage of Reap and Murder by 25%.

Your Murder is transformed into Shudder Scythe, which costs additional Runic Power but deals increased damage and generates Soul Fragments.Shudder Scythe (Transform)Strike an enemy 5 times, each dealing 30% Weapon Damage, scaling with level, and granting you a Soul Fragment with each strike.

Your Physical damage dealt to enemies now grants Crimson Thirst for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.Crimson Thirst (Stacks)Your next Murder within 15 seconds deals 10% increased damage and costs -10% less Runic Power per stack. At 5 stacks, it also heals you equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 50%.

While dual-wielding, your auto attacks now have a 15% chance to make your next Murder free of cost.

Critical strikes with Dirge now generate 10 Runic Power.

Critical strikes with Murder now generate 1 additional Reaped Soul.
Increases the damage of Deathwind, Murder, and Soul Strike by 30%.
Wraithblade now creates a spectral version of yourself for 12 seconds that casts Dirge and Murder on enemies.
Increases the Runic Power generated by Reap by 5.

Dealing damage with Reap, Dreadwake and Soul Strike now grants a stack of Painmail for 15 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

When Painmail stacks expire naturally, you are healed for 2% of your maximum health and reduce the cooldown of Bolstered Form by -0.5 sec for each stack.
Increases the damage of Reap and Murder by 25%.
Increases the damage of Reap, Dirge, and Reliquary of the Lost by 20%.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Reap, Deathchaser, and Wraithblade by 10%.

Create 1 Tormented Soul and generate Runic Power for each Reaped Soul active.

Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion.
Tormented SoulsReduces all direct damage you take by -10% and heals you for 35 + 5.8% AP + 24% Stamina, removing 1 stack. Lasts 20 seconds.
Your Tormented Souls now creates 1 additional soul for each Reaped Soul active.
Casting Spectre Stride now generates 1 Reaped Soul.

Summons 1 Spectral Scythe for each Reaped Soul active which attack a nearby enemy for 20 seconds.

Striking enemies with Soul Strike causes the Spectral Scythe to attack that enemy and 5 nearby enemies. 

Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion.
Generating a Reaped Soul now reduces damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Requiem and Soulrend now have a 40% chance to refund a Reaped Soul.
Erupt with ghastly force whenever you harvest a Reaped Soul, dealing 47 + 10.5% Stamina + 15% AP Spellshadow Damage to nearby enemies over 6 seconds.

For the duration of Spectral Scythe, the damage of Soul Strike is increased by 20%.

In addition, generating a Reaped Soul now has a 10% chance to summon a Spectral Scythe to fight alongside you for 10 sec.

Level 20 Passive
Direct Physical damage dealt now has a 5% chance to grant you Extinction for 10 seconds.

Embrace your sinister thoughts, instantly generating 3 Reaped Souls.

Your Reliquary of the Lost is now guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage on enemies below 20% health.
Increases the damage of Reap, Dirge, and Reliquary of the Lost by 20%.
When you gain Soul Infusion, the damage of your Soulrend and Reliquary of the Lost is increased by 20% for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Reduces the cooldown of Reliquary of the Lost by -5 sec.
Dealing damage with Reliquary of the Lost now has a 8% chance to launch an additional Soul Bolt.

Requiem.baseDescription: Swing at enemies around you in a fury of souls, dealing 67 + 40% AP Shadowfrost Damage, reducing their melee and ranged attack speed by -20% for 15 seconds, and generating Runic Power.

modifyingTalents.description: Requiem and Soulrend now have a 40% chance to refund a Reaped Soul.
Increases the effectiveness of your Rites by 20%.

Scythe Rush.baseDescription:
Rush towards an enemy and generate 15 Runic Power.

Cannot be used on the same target more than once every 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: After using Spectre Stride, Scythe Rush, or Veilwalk you now gain a shield that absorbs 114 + 33% AP damage for 6 seconds.

Sever.baseDescription: Attempt to drain an enemies vitals, leeching 22 + 31.03% AP health, interrupting casting and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Resets the cooldown of Limbo, Soulslam, and Shade.

Usable while stealthed.

Sinister Litany now increases the damage of your next spell or ability within 10 sec by 50% and casting it now grants you Ghost for 3 seconds.Ghost (Proc)Enter an enhanced stealth mode that does not break on damage dealt or taken.

Slaughter.baseDescription:
Generates 1 Reaped Soul
Eradicate an enemy with your scythe, dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus 14.

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 20 Passive
Direct Physical damage dealt now has a 5% chance to grant you Extinction for 10 seconds.

Chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10% for each Reaped Soul active.ExtinctionYour next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, dealing direct damage now has a 15% chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

Level 30 Passive
Avoiding attacks now has a 50% chance to harvest a Soul Fragment from the attacker.

Strike all nearby enemies for 55% Weapon Damage plus 6.

Damage dealt harvests a Soul Fragment, up to a maximum of 3.

Soul Harvester.baseDescription: Landing the killing blow on a target that yields experience or honor now grants Soul Harvester for 10 seconds.Soul HarvesterAfter killing an enemy you generate 2 Runic Power every 1 sec.

When you gain Soul Infusion, you are protected from being slowed below 100% of normal speed for 5 seconds.
Casting abilities that require Soul Infusion now has a 50% chance to restore 5% of your missing health.

Level 10 Passive
Consuming Soul Infusion now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -3 sec.

Soul Knight.baseDescription: Your successful parries and dodges increase all healing you receive by 2% and reduce all Magic damage taken by -2% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Soul Protector.baseDescription: Increases Armor contribution from items by 25% and increases your magic resistances by 21.

Soul Tap.baseDescription:
Chip away at the very essence of your own soul, generating 50 Runic Power.

Usable while stealthed.

Soul Warden.baseDescription: Increases your melee attack power by 1 for every 50 Armor you have.

modifyingTalents.description: Requiem and Soulrend now have a 40% chance to refund a Reaped Soul.
Increases the duration of Soulrend by 10 sec.
Increases the amount of armor Soulrend causes you to ignore by 10%.

Level 10 Passive
Your Soulrend now also applies Weakened Soul, increasing the target's Shadow and Frost damage taken from you by 10%.
Your Wraithblade now deals double damage to enemies affected by Soulrend.
Increases the duration of Ghostly Weapon and Soulrend by 5 sec.
When you gain Soul Infusion, the damage of your Soulrend and Reliquary of the Lost is increased by 20% for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Increases the duration of your Spectral Scythes by 10 sec.
Damage dealt by Spectral Scythes and Spectral Wardens now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -0.5 sec.

Spectral Warden.baseDescription: Summon a spectral guardian to fight along side you for 20 seconds and apply an absorption shield to up to 8 allies within 20 yds, absorbing 199 + 150% Stamina damage.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Spectral Warden now causes you to summon 2 additional Spectral Wardens, but their duration is reduced by -8 sec.

In addition, increases the amount absorbed by the shield granted by Spectral Warden by 100%.
Reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -60 sec and it now heals you equal to 200% of the damage it deals.
Damage dealt by Spectral Scythes and Spectral Wardens now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -0.5 sec.

Your Spectral Warden now causes you to summon 2 additional Spectral Wardens, but their duration is reduced by -8 sec.

In addition, increases the amount absorbed by the shield granted by Spectral Warden by 100%.
Damage dealt by Spectral Scythes and Spectral Wardens now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -0.5 sec.
After using Spectre Stride, Scythe Rush, or Veilwalk you now gain a shield that absorbs 114 + 33% AP damage for 6 seconds.
Increases the range of Spectre Stride by 10 yds and causes it to generate 10 more Runic Power.
Casting Spectre Stride now generates 1 Reaped Soul.
Spectre Stride now deals an additional 125% of its damage dealt over 5 seconds.
Increases the damage of Spectre Stride by 30% and reduces the chance for enemies to see you while stealthed.

Spirit Render.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell penetration by 20, scaling with your level.

The Jailer's Call.baseDescription: Attacks against enemies below 20% health deal an additional 140 + 18% AP Shadow damage.

The Time Has Come.baseDescription: Your abilities now deal 10% more damage against slowed targets.

Veilwalk.baseDescription:
2 Charges, 60 sec recharge
Move with spectral agility, gaining 50% increased movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Removes all movement impairing effects. Usable while stealthed.

Increases the movement speed granted by Veilwalk by 20%.

Level 10 Passive
Your Soulrend now also applies Weakened Soul, increasing the target's Shadow and Frost damage taken from you by 10%.
